address_sanctioned.csv.category: Sanctioned & Regulatory Blacklisted (OFAC / SEC / Tether USDT / Circle USDC custodial freezes)

notes: Category 1 (sanctioned) is the smallest, highest-signal slice — wallets formally blocked through legal/regulatory mechanisms. We pin only this file for now; address_flagged.csv.gz (11 MB) and address_fraud.csv.gz can be added later if the rule surface grows to cover them.
